untranslatable_reason: Signal requires put-call ratio (P_it / (P_it + C_it)) derived from options market data. This is not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list, which contains only price, volume, and technical analysis indicators. The signal depends on non-market maker option flow data that cannot be replicated from standard OHLCV bars.
translation_notes: SSRN_622869_5 is a fundamental options market microstructure signal based on informed trading activity in the options market. It requires: (1) segregation of non-market maker option trades, (2) put and call contract volume separately, and (3) calculation of put-call ratio. None of these data sources are available in a standard backtest engine with only price/volume/technical indicators. To implement this signal, the backtest engine would need to be extended with options-level data feeds and order flow analysis capabilities.
